lede: A look at July 12 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Julius Caesar and Evaristo Felice Dall'Abaco, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: United States Army
events.desc: U.S. Army Apache helicopters engage in airstrikes against armed insurgents in Baghdad, Iraq, where civilians are killed; footage from the cockpit is later leaked to the Internet.

events.title: France national football team
events.desc: France win their first World Cup title, defeating defending champions Brazil 3–0.

events.title: Kiribati
events.desc: The island nation of Kiribati becomes independent from the United Kingdom.

events.title: São Tomé and Príncipe
events.desc: São Tomé and Príncipe declare independence from Portugal.

events.title: India
events.desc: Indian city Pune floods due to failure of the Khadakwasla and Panshet dams, killing at least two thousand people.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: Battle of Kursk: German and Soviet forces engage in the Battle of Prokhorovka, one of the largest armored engagements of all time.

events.title: Soviet–Lithuanian Peace Treaty
events.desc: The Soviet–Lithuanian Peace Treaty is signed, by which Soviet Russia recognizes the independence of Lithuania.

events.title: 1847 Woodstock riot
events.desc: A riot occurred in Woodstock, New Brunswick, between Catholics and members of the Orange Order that resulted in up to ten deaths.

events.title: Bavaria
events.desc: At the insistence of Napoleon, Bavaria, Baden, Württemberg and thirteen minor principalities leave the Holy Roman Empire and form the Confederation of the Rhine.

events.title: James Cook
events.desc: Captain James Cook begins his third voyage.

births.name: Pablo Neruda
births.line: Chilean poet and diplomat, Nobel Prize laureate

deaths.text: D. T. Suzuki, Japanese philosopher and author
Evaristo Felice Dall'Abaco, Italian violinist and composer

observances.text: Christian feast day: Feast of Saints Peter and Paul (Eastern Orthodox)
Christian feast day: Jason of Thessalonica (Catholic Church)
Christian feast day: Louis Martin and Marie-Azélie Guérin
Christian feast day: Nathan Söderblom (Lutheran, Episcopal Church (USA))
